TimeEntry.Title: Joseph - Bad docking station
TimeEntry.Notes: Joseph's new docking station reported that it has a bad fan. Users reported that the fan was making a loud noise. Swapped out docking station with a loaner and will open RMA with Dell for replacement.

TimeEntry.Title: Joseph - Bad docking station
TimeEntry.Notes: Installed laptop. Data transfer and set up Onedrive. Problem with one drive folders not populating. Re-installed and Re-Sync to resolve issue. Follow up with Rick regarding RAM on his laptop.

TimeEntry.Title: Created the document on Newstar Installation on a workstation
TimeEntry.Notes: Created the document on Newstar Installation on a workstation by going through the recorded session and sent to Sunny for verification then will upload it on the BWH channel.

TimeEntry.Title: Cisco Stack Firmware upgrade
TimeEntry.Notes: Stack member3 did not come up after the reboot and stuck on ROMMON, removed the switch from Stack, pushed the firmware again and it failed, formated the flash disk on the switch and uploaded the firmw

TimeEntry.Title: Threshold setup on OPS
TimeEntry.Notes: OPS sending lots of emails on QNAP storage needs attention, checked QNAP and found the snapshots threshold is not configured, configured the snapshots threshold accordingly and rebooted qnap.

TimeEntry.Title: New Employee
TimeEntry.Notes: This was an email request from Dave regarding the setup of the new employee, Joon Kwon. I created the user account in the domain controller and synced it with M365 using PowerShell. I requested a lice

TimeEntry.Notes: This was a critical alert from OPS Manager indicating that the BWH-HQ-DT-01 machine was down. I checked on myremote and confirmed that the machine is online. Hence closing the ticket

TimeEntry.Title: Malwarebytes Agent updated with new Ver 1.2.0.1125 on BWLAP-01
